title: Canthium macrocalyx
taxonomy: Canthium macrocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Canthium macrocalyx is as follows: genus Canthium, family Rubiaceae, order Gentianales, class Magnoliopsida, and kingdom Plantae. Canthium macrocalyx is a member of the large and diverse family Rubiaceae, which consists of over 600 genera and 13,000 species of flowering plants. The classification of Canthium macrocalyx is subject to change as new research and discoveries are made in the field of botany.
uses: Canthium macrocalyx is a plant species that has been found to have various medicinal uses. Traditionally, it has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. The plant's leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. In some cultures, Canthium macrocalyx is also used to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Further research is needed to confirm the plant's full range of medicinal properties.
